description: Curated webpage-generation and web-quality skills for ForkProbe artifact comparison. Repository stars are discovery signals only; candidates are selected by task fit, output contract, dependencies, and headless execution readiness.

skills.name: baseline + web renderer
skills.summary_zh: 不使用专门网页 skill，直接由主模型生成完整可运行网页，作为成品基线。
skills.summary_en: No specialized web skill; the main model generates a complete runnable webpage as the artifact baseline.

skills.name: Anthropic frontend-design + web renderer
skills.author: Anthropic
skills.summary_zh: 强调主题化视觉方向、排版、响应式和避免模板化 AI 设计，适合完整页面和产品界面。
skills.summary_en: Emphasizes subject-specific visual direction, typography, responsiveness, and avoiding generic AI design for complete pages and product interfaces.

skills.name: Anthropic web-artifacts-builder
skills.author: Anthropic
skills.summary_zh: 面向复杂交互网页，使用 React、TypeScript、Tailwind 和组件化结构生成可运行 Web artifact。
skills.summary_en: Targets complex interactive web artifacts with React, TypeScript, Tailwind, and componentized implementation.

skills.name: UI/UX Pro Max + web renderer
skills.author: NextLevelBuilder
skills.summary_zh: 先检索设计系统、产品类型、配色、字体和 UX 规则，再由网页 renderer 生成成品。
skills.summary_en: Builds a design system from product, style, color, typography, and UX guidance before rendering the finished page.

skills.name: web-design-engineer
skills.author: ConardLi
skills.summary_zh: 直接生成 HTML/CSS/JavaScript/React 页面、Dashboard、原型或可视化，并包含浏览器验收思路。
skills.summary_en: Directly creates HTML/CSS/JavaScript/React pages, dashboards, prototypes, or visualizations with browser acceptance guidance.

skills.name: baoyu-design web prototype
skills.author: JimLiu
skills.summary_zh: 生成自包含 HTML 的高保真 UI、交互原型、Landing Page 和 Dashboard，便于本地预览与比较。
skills.summary_en: Produces self-contained HTML for high-fidelity UI, interactive prototypes, landing pages, and dashboards.

skills.name: html-anything prototype-web
skills.author: nexu-io
skills.summary_zh: 模板驱动的完整产品 Landing Page，固定覆盖导航、Hero、Features、CTA、FAQ 和响应式交互。
skills.summary_en: Template-driven product landing page covering navigation, hero, features, CTA, FAQ, responsive layout, and interactions.

skills.name: UI Craft web pipeline
skills.author: educlopez
skills.summary_zh: 强调设计发现、token、排版、动效、响应式和交付检查，适合第二批精细化候选。
skills.summary_en: Emphasizes discovery, tokens, typography, motion, responsive behavior, and finish checks for a high-craft second-wave candidate.

skills.name: Impeccable craft pipeline
skills.author: Peter Bakaus
skills.summary_zh: 覆盖从零制作、重设计和精修网页，流程较重，适合用户明确要求高强度视觉打磨时加入。
skills.summary_en: Covers from-scratch creation, redesign, and refinement; best added when the user explicitly wants a deeper craft pass.

skills.name: gstack design-html
skills.author: Garry Tan
skills.summary_zh: 可从描述或已确认 mockup 生成生产级 HTML/CSS，但完整执行依赖 gstack/Pretext 工具链。
skills.summary_en: Can turn a description or approved mockup into production HTML/CSS, but full execution depends on the gstack/Pretext toolchain.

skills.name: Google Stitch design + React components
skills.author: Google Labs
skills.summary_zh: 先用 Stitch 生成设计，再同步成模块化 React 页面；只有当前 Agent 已连接 Stitch MCP 时启用。
skills.summary_en: Generates designs with Stitch and converts them into modular React pages; enable only when Stitch MCP is connected.

skills.name: SuperDesign web flow
skills.author: SuperDesign
skills.summary_zh: 支持设计画布、视觉分支和多页面 flow，但需要 SuperDesign CLI 登录。
skills.summary_en: Supports design canvas, visual variants, and multi-page flows, but requires authenticated SuperDesign CLI access.

skills.name: brand-landingpage + Stitch
skills.author: wshobson
skills.summary_zh: 品牌访谈到 Landing Page 的专用流程，依赖 Stitch，且不适合 Dashboard 或多页面应用。
skills.summary_en: Brand-interview-to-landing-page workflow requiring Stitch; not intended for dashboards or multi-page applications.

skills.name: Vercel web quality checks
skills.author: Vercel
skills.summary_zh: Web Design Guidelines 与 React Best Practices 更适合统一审查所有候选，不作为独立生成路线。
skills.summary_en: Web Design Guidelines and React Best Practices are better applied as common QA across candidates, not as a standalone generation route.

skills.name: MengTo web design modules
skills.author: Meng To
skills.summary_zh: Landing、GSAP、Three.js、WebGL 等专项模块，适合作为用户点名的风格增强，不作为默认完整 pipeline。
skills.summary_en: Focused landing, GSAP, Three.js, and WebGL modules; use as user-requested style extensions rather than a default complete pipeline.
